slots.notes: Full-width background image for the entire section. A deep, dark, rich abstract background with geometric shapes and a viblant, sci-fi accent overlay. No people, no text on the image. Object-cover, min-h[300px]. Native placeholder is a dark abstract pattern with a neon/blue glow accent; replace with brand-specific visual. Fills the entire section - full-width, full-vhieght.

The brand logo at the top-left of the hero. About 48px. It is an inline SVG icon or group-ic. Note: your brand logo gets the 'fg' text color - not a separate brand color. Native placeholder is a stylized circular shape or abstract logo mark.

The primary CTA button - it reads something like 'Enter Now' . It's a quarter rounded button with bg and text-accent in the same neon/blue. This is running text - no data backend needed. A simple button with hover: opacity 0.9. Border-radius: 8px. Note: text-accent-color.

Three text fields: a

heading

,

body

, and a subtext/disclaimer. Each one is in its own card or section. The heading is the most prominent - something like 'Step into Digital Reality.' The body is a short paragraph. The subtext could be a date, a disclaimer, an expiration. These are running text - they are for you to fill in. No data backend. The heading is the most prominent - large, font-bold, tracking-tight. The body is smaller, more contrast. The subtext is the smallest. Note: bolder plate. Supply dummy text that reads well - brand will replace.

mechanic: A full-screen hero with image, brand, headline, body, subtext, and CTA button. Framer Motion useInView for entry. Left-text, right-image layout with full-width background.
techDelivery: React 18 + TypeScript. Tailwind CSS 3 as arbitrary values. Framer Motion v12 + for scroll-triggered animation. Icons from lucide-react.
reskinNotes: This is a blank slate for a vr/ar/dark-tech brand. Every text blend is hardcoded as dummy copy - Brand, Hero (CTA, Title, Subtitle, Body) - there is no CS/backend. The fonts and color scheme are not tokens or variables - you are responsible for changing them. The assets (background image, logo) are for you to replace with your brand's. The color scheme is in - you can change.
